name: EMQ
description: EMQ — Scalable MQTT broker (EMQX) for IoT deployments with millions of concurrent connections and rule engine.

seo.title: EMQ — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: EMQ: EMQ — Scalable MQTT broker (EMQX) for IoT deployments with millions of concurrent connections and rule engine.

when_to_use: Scaling MQTT broker to 10M+ concurrent IoT connections
Rule engine routing MQTT events to Kafka or databases
EMQX cluster for industrial IoT and smart factory messaging
Managed MQTT-as-a-service for device fleet communication
Replacing HiveMQ or Mosquitto with highly scalable EMQX

pros: Scales to millions of MQTT clients
review.verdict: The most scalable open-source MQTT broker, provided you have the ops muscle or pay for managed.
review.best_for: Large IoT deployments needing massive MQTT fan-out and rules
review.not_for: Small projects where Mosquitto or a managed broker is simpler

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
